title: Better Business Bureau: Smart Shopping in Tough Times
summary: HOME | Page 11 Better Business Bureau: Smart Shopping in Tough Times Photo Credit: Getty Images | Better Business Bureau Great West + Pacific When budgets tighten, it’s only natural to hunt for deals and discounts. But in challenging economic times, cutting corners on essential services like car maintenance, home repairs, or seeking critical professional advice can backfire. Research shows that when we shop, we value trust, quality, and reliability over rock-bottom prices. Deloitte’s consumer insights leader noted it’s “no longer about ‘cheap’ but more about ‘worth.’” The numbers tell the same story: up to 40 percent of what makes something feel valuable comes from...

title: A Kodiak couple faces possible deportation due to a voter registration error by the state
summary: The ferry terminal at Pier 1 in Kodiak is seen on July 14, 2021. (Photo by James Brooks/Alaska Beacon) A years-old mistake by the Alaska Department of Motor Vehicles voter registration program has endangered the citizenship of two prominent Kodiak residents and could cause them to be deported, according to a newly filed lawsuit in Alaska’s federal court. The suit, filed Thursday by Eva Benedelova and Pavel Benedela in the U.S. District Court for the District of Alaska, says U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services canceled their citizenship oath ceremony because they were erroneously registered to vote in Alaska when they updated their driver’s licenses in 2022. USCIS is overdue on a decision abo...

title: Q&A: State Trooper Alisha Seward on day-to-day work at the Wrangell Post
summary: State Trooper Alisha Seward talks with KSTK on Dec. 11, 2025 about her job and how she handles complicated interactions. (Colette Czarnecki/KSTK) After three Wrangell residents pleaded guilty to possessing and transporting illegally harvested elk , KSTK’s Colette Czarnecki spoke with State Trooper Alisha Seward. They discussed what Seward’s job entails at the Wrangell post and how she navigates complicated interactions. This conversation has been edited for clarity and brevity.
